name: Savory Asiago and Blue Cheesecake Spread
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
2 Wrap aluminum foil around the base and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3 Combine cream cheese, asiago, and blue cheese in a food processor. Process until smooth and well blended.
4 Add eggs, whipping cream, and white pepper; mix well, scraping sides often.
5 Pour mixture into prepared springform pan.
6 Place pan in a larger roasting pan; pour warm water into the roasting pan up to a depth of 1 inch.
7 Bake in the preheated oven for 40-50 minutes, or until top is lightly browned and center has set.
8 Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving at room temperature. Garnish with jalapeno jelly or onion marmalade.
